node.text: Evan finds watercolor painting to be a stress reliever and a way to express emotions.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "painting share Sam October") on Session 11 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: Evan paints what's on their mind or how they feel, including good memories or places they want to go to.
